name: S-12 merge-registry includes a bundled catalog entry in the merged output when the operator file does not touch it
command: printf -- '- id: bundled-source\n  url: https://x.com\n' > catalog.yaml && printf -- '[]' > operator.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/merge-registry.sh" --catalog catalog.yaml --operator operator.yaml --emit merged.yaml && grep -q 'id: bundled-source' merged.yaml && echo merged 1>&2
